channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Windows 11 Solution To Remove Text Popup
item.description: Windows 11 open registry to HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Control Panel\Mouse set MouseHoverTime to -2000 minus sign required to remove popup
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: Windows 11 Taskbar icons on multiple screens
item.description: In Windows 11, small icons on the right side of the taskbar only show on the main screen and are hidden on other monitors. How to make them appear on all monitors?
item.dc:creator: DaxxonFoster

item.title: Six months after reinstalling the operating system, I received a prompt to activate Windows 11.
item.description: When I sent my computer in for repairs, the shop reinstalled the operating system. Recently, I’ve been prompted to activate Windows. The Home and Student edition that came pre-installed on the computer was genuine. Can I switch back to the original version and have it activated automatically? Or do...
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: Failed to install Windows 11 Update 25H2, error code 0xc190011f
item.description: When I try to update to Windows 11 25H2, I get an installation error with the error code 0xc190011f. How can I fix this?
item.dc:creator: KairosRivers

item.title: Dissecting LLM Container Cold-Start: Where the Time Actually Goes
item.description: Dissecting LLM Container Cold-Start: Where the Time Actually Goes Cold-start latency determines whether GPU clusters can scale to zero, how fast they can autoscale, and whether bursty or low-QPS workloads are economically viable. Most optimization effort targets the container pull path – faster...
item.dc:creator: robcronin

item.title: Outside the Insider Program
item.description: HiIm registered with Insider program for many years.I have been away for quite some time, but it says Im still registered.I thought I'd give it a go again as I read about the "reboot" but I cant find the insider screen on my update page.Copilot says (perhaps I shouldn't take any notice) that I can...
item.dc:creator: Mark Jones

item.title: Restrict Users from Creating New Teams in Microsoft Teams
item.description: Hello together,I've do this here: Manage who can create Microsoft 365 Groups | Microsoft LearnI create a group for users, that allowed to create new Teams Channels and run the script, but i didnt see in the updated settings the group ID: What im doing wrong?At the moment no one can create new Teams...
item.dc:creator: GodCordial

item.title: What to do if iPad is disabled and says to connect to iTunes?
item.description: Hey everyone,My iPad is disabled and the screen says to connect to iTunes. I am not really sure what that means or what I am supposed to do next. I tried unlocking it too many times, and now I am stuck.I am not very techy, so I would really appreciate simple advice. Is there any way to fix iPad is...
item.dc:creator: Willienood

item.title: OneDrive Sync Client Changes How It Processes Deleted Files
item.description: Microsoft plans a May 2026 update for the OneDrive Sync client to improve the way that the client handles the deletion of files stored in SharePoint Online and OneDrive for Business. The client will no longer move the local synchronized copy of the deleted file into the workstation’s recycle bin,...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: I am going to DVD Copying on Windows PC
item.description: Can anyone advice this novice of the best way to digitise DVD/Bluray movies with menu and subtitle options remaining intact?Just wanting to copy some DVD's I already own for preservation and personal use.Hoping for a relatively inexpensive program, though, also need ease of use.PC: Windows Insider...
item.dc:creator: Kaisond

item.title: Is it possible to stream a ps5 on a laptop screen?
item.description: I have managed to obtain a ps5 just for gta6 but all the stationary screens I have available are inconvenient. I’m pretty sure my laptop (windows) can’t accept video with just a cable. Is there a program that can work as an adapter or does play station offer streaming to other devices?
item.dc:creator: Philipess

item.title: Could I get some help checking what I'm doing wrong with Hello?
item.description: Hi, I've been trying to start working my way through the learnopengl tutorials but I've got stuck almost straight away. Would anyone mind telling me what I've got wrong with this: The clear colour is showing but no triangle is showing.
item.dc:creator: Uriellip

item.title: From Portal Edits to GitOps : Deploying Azure API Management Configuration with APIOps
item.description: Introduction Modern enterprise platforms are increasingly built around APIs, and Azure API Management (APIM) sits at the heart of these systems as the control plane for enforcing policies, managing access, and routing traffic. While APIM provides a powerful interface through the Azure portal, many...
item.dc:creator: aloormahesh

item.title: Protect org data on BYOD Windows / macOS devices
item.description: Hi AllI hope you are well.Anyway, I have a need to protect org data on:Window personal / BYOD devicesMacOS personal / BYOD devicesWhat's the best way to achieve this?My thinking is:1 X Conditional Access policy that blocks1 X Conditional Access policy that allows via Edge, no persistent session, no...
item.dc:creator: StuartK73

item.title: How do I [23F] stop being scared of the men trespassing our backyard
item.description: I thought I would be brave and strong when it comes to this but it turns out I am a scaredy cat.I was home alone this 10 in the morning when I heard footsteps around the house, and up in our roof. I was sure the men are back again in our backyard, stealing our fruits. We have avocado trees in our...
item.dc:creator: Kaisond

item.title: Is it possible to stream a ps5 on a laptop screen?
item.description: I have managed to obtain a ps5 just for gta6 but all the stationary screens I have available are inconvenient. I’m pretty sure my laptop (windows) can’t accept video with just a cable. Is there a program that can work as an adapter or does play station offer streaming to other devices?
item.dc:creator: Philipess

item.title: How can I fully know if an SD card is damaged?
item.description: A couple of weeks ago, I updated my Redmi Note 8 OS to MIUI 12. Everything went well, except for the fact that now I couldn't get permissions to move screenshots and imagines to my SD card. I tried everything and it still wouldn't let me under any circumstances and there's a clear abnormality when...
item.dc:creator: Luccask

item.title: Rethinking Data Modeling: How GitHub Copilot Is Changing the Way We Design Systems
item.description: There is a point in every engineer’s journey where data modeling stops feeling intuitive. What starts as a clean schema becomes harder to reason about. Relationships blur. Query paths multiply. Small changes ripple across different steps. This is where data modeling reveals its real challenge: not...
item.dc:creator: B_Manasa

item.title: How can I transfer text messages from iphone to computer?
item.description: Hi everyone,There are so many important contacts on my iPhone so I would like to backup all my text messages from my iPhone onto my computer, just in case something happens to my phone. I don't want to lose years of conversations with family and friends. The problem is, I'm not very tech‑savvy, and...
item.dc:creator: CaliforniaGolden

item.title: YouTubeをMP3に変換するのに最適なサイトはどこですか？
item.description: 本当に知りたいです。こんにちは。最近、音楽を保存するためにyoutube mp3 変換 サイトを使おうかと考えていますが、安全性 についてとても不安があります。2026年現在でも、このようなサイトは安全に使えるのでしょうか？広告が多かったり、怪しいダ ウンロードボタンが表示されたりすることがあり、ウイルス感染やマルウェアのリスクが気になります。また、youtube mp3 変換...
item.dc:creator: Syamter

item.title: Azure AI Foundry vs Traditional ML Pipelines: What’s Different and Why It Matters
item.description: The Traditional ML Pipeline: What It Was Built For Traditional ML pipelines typically look like this: Data ingestion and preparation Model training (often batch‑oriented) Model validation and versioning Deployment via APIs or batch jobs Monitoring focused on accuracy and drift This approach worked...
item.dc:creator: Parvathy_R_Pillai

item.title: How to Troubleshoot Azure Functions Service Bus Trigger Issues
item.description: Table of Contents Overview Understanding How the Service Bus Trigger Works Message Processing Flow Key Concepts host.json Configuration Reference Issue Categories Common Causes and Solutions 1. Connection String or Configuration Errors 2. Authentication and Authorization Failures (RBAC / SAS) 3....
item.dc:creator: vikasgupta5

item.title: Microsoft’s New In‑House AI Models (MAI‑Transcribe, MAI‑Voice, MAI‑Image)
item.description: What Are the New MAI Models? MAI‑Transcribe‑1 (Speech‑to‑Text) MAI‑Transcribe‑1 is Microsoft’s first‑generation in‑house speech recognition model. It supports 25 languages and is optimized for real‑world, noisy enterprise audio, such as meetings and call centers. Key highlights Enterprise‑grade...
item.dc:creator: kumar_rahul

item.title: Employee Onboarding in a Day: Creating Role-Specific Training Guides from SharePoint Content
item.description: In today’s fast-paced business environment, the expectation to get new employees productive as quickly as possible is higher than ever. Yet, onboarding often remains one of the most fragmented and time-consuming processes within organizations. Information is scattered, training materials are...
item.dc:creator: JohnNaguib

item.title: Dev Containers for .NET in VS Code: A Beginner‑Friendly Guide That Actually Works
item.description: What Dev Containers are really about At a high level, Dev Containers let you use a Docker container as your development environment inside VS Code. But the real idea is not “Docker for development”. The real idea is this: Move all environment complexity out of your laptop and into...
item.dc:creator: Debapriya

item.title: Azure Key Vault Auto‑Rotation Practicle Guide
item.description: If you’ve ever been called into a Severity-1 issue because a certificate expired at midnight, you already understand why credential rotation matters. Keys, secrets, and certificates sit quietly in the background and when they expire, applications go dark, trust breaks, and teams scramble. This is...
item.dc:creator: ChandraHundigam_MSFT

item.title: How ACR Artifact Cache Handles Multi-Arch Images: What Gets Cached and When Webhooks Fire
item.description: By Johnson Shi (Senior Product Manager), Toddy Mladenov (Principal PM Manager), Luis Dieguez (Principal SWE Manager), Akash Singhal (Senior Software Engineer), Kiran Challa (Senior Software Engineer), Ren Shao (Senior Software Engineer) Introduction Three of the most common questions we hear from...
item.dc:creator: johnsonshi_msft

item.title: Modernizing Industrial Safety and Inspection with AI-Driven Drone Automation
item.description: In large-scale manufacturing and infrastructure environments, maintaining structural integrity is a continuous operational challenge. Industrial facilities—from automotive plants to energy and infrastructure sites—depend on thousands of structural connection points such as bolts and fasteners to...
item.dc:creator: PeterTHLee

item.title: Notice about upcoming new format for GitHub App installation tokens
item.description: Starting April 27th 2026 and over the coming weeks, we will begin a staged rollout that updates the format of newly minted GitHub App installation tokens, making them more performant… The post Notice about upcoming new format for GitHub App installation tokens appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Azure MCP Server now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb)
item.description: Azure MCP Server is now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb), enabling one-click installation into Claude Desktop and other MCP-compatible clients. The post Azure MCP Server now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb) appeared first on Azure SDK Blog.
item.dc:creator: Victor Colin Amador

item.title: What’s new in Microsoft Entra – March 2026
item.description: From January through March 2026, Microsoft Entra introduced key updates to help organizations strengthen identity security, simplify governance, and improve user experience. This Q1 roundup highlights the latest feature releases and important changes—organized by product—so you can quickly see...
item.dc:creator: ShobhitSahay

item.title: Changes to notification retention and archived repository watches
item.description: Two updates will change the way GitHub notifications and repository watches are retained. These updates are rolling out soon, and are expected to be completed over the next few months.… The post Changes to notification retention and archived repository watches appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: AI-Powered Downtime Investigation for Azure VMs: Automating Root Cause Analysis
item.description: Co-authors: Jie Su, Abhinav Dua, Mukthar Ahmed, Dhruv Joshi, Dibyendu Mondal In a previous post, we shared how Azure Automated VM Recovery works to minimize virtual machine downtime through a three-stage approach: Detection, Diagnosis, and Mitigation. This post goes one layer deeper into how our...
item.dc:creator: Jon_Andoni_Baranda

item.title: Microsoft’s perspective on agentic identity standards
item.description: A new identity inflection point If you’ve gotten past the headline to this first sentence, you’re probably my kind of people. You’re probably a professional in the world of IAM (Identity and Access Management) who’s looking after their own enterprise; and you may even have opinions about what the...
item.dc:creator: Pamela Dingle

item.title: GPT-5.5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description: GPT-5.5, OpenAI’s latest GPT model, is now rolling out on GitHub Copilot. In our early testing, GPT-5.5 delivers its strongest performance on complex, multi-step agentic coding task and resolves real-world… The post GPT-5.5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Designing a Medallion Framework — A Decision Guide
item.description: Everyone draws the same picture: Bronze → Silver → Gold. Three boxes, three arrows. Done. What that picture hides is the dozen design decisions you have to make inside each box — and the ones you make at the boundaries between them. Get those right and onboarding the 200th table feels like...
item.dc:creator: Subhajit1994

item.title: Enhancing Enterprise AI Deployments with Zero Trust Networking
item.description: Problem Statement Azure OpenAI is publicly accessible by default Azure OpenAI frequently asked questions | Microsoft Learn Any application with API access can call it from anywhere Violates: Enterprise security policies Zero Trust architecture Key principles of the Zero Trust network model...
item.dc:creator: kirankumar_manchiwar04

item.title: Inline agent mode in preview and more in GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs
item.description: This update introduces inline agent mode in preview, enhancements to Next Edit Suggestions, global auto approve, and more flexible controls for terminal commands and file edits. It also includes several… The post Inline agent mode in preview and more in GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs appeared...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Get ahead of agent sprawl: manage and govern AI agents at scale
item.description: Recently, my team and I met with customers across several industries including finance, retail, telecommunications, and the public sector regarding the topic of agent adoption. During our time with them, several key themes bubbled to the surface. While AI agent adoption is growing rapidly, we need...
item.dc:creator: NgoziNwoko

item.title: Functionality to mark a slide complete
item.description: I do not believe this functionality alread exists but I'm quite sure I'm not the only one that would love to have it added. Now when working in a larger powerpoint slide deck I start with adding a "traffic light" to my slides that's red, and when the slide is finished I turn it green. Then, before...
item.dc:creator: ABDAF

item.title: My Android Windows 95 Theme
item.description: Delete if not allowed, but I just wanted to show off my Windows 95 android theme I put together using an app called "Launcher95" and some extra icons I downloaded. I got the icons for my text and phone apps from (I'm not affiliated with either the app or the Tumblr account, just a nostalgia-lover)....
item.dc:creator: Yahyayo

item.title: Need for speed carbon rework V3 crashes everytime after finishing the intro
item.description: I wanted to play on my Windows 10 latest version the nfsc rework v3 but when i tried to load it, it doesnt work. I cant find an way to repair it. The only thing i tried is to put the game files into the "Games" folder but it still does not work. My PC Specs are: Ryzen 5 5600x, 16gb ddr4 3600mhz,...
item.dc:creator: Zaidpin

item.title: Axios npm Supply Chain Compromise – Guidance for Azure Pipelines Customers
item.description: On March 31, 2026, malicious versions of the widely used JavaScript HTTP client library Axios were briefly published to the npm registry as part of a supply chain attack. The affected versions — 1.14.1 and 0.30.4 — included a hidden malicious dependency that executed during installation and...
item.dc:creator: Josef Sin

item.title: Why does a pop up appear when opening Storage in Windows 11 Settings?
item.description: A pop‑up appears when I open Storage in Settings. Why does this happen? I can still view storage if I click No.
item.dc:creator: KairosRivers

item.title: Windows11 Prompts Secure Boot KEK Update Should I Install It?
item.description: The system showed a "Secure Boot KEK update" notification. What is this, and is it necessary to install?
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: What should I do if my computer won't boot after installing MacDrive on Windows 11?
item.description: Hello, I installed MacDrive on my computer and restarted it, but now I can't boot into the system. How can I fix this?
item.dc:creator: EmmettBrooks

item.title: In Windows 10, clicking the Start menu does not respond
item.description: A few days ago, after a Windows 10 automatic update, the system became very sluggish, and the Start menu stopped responding to clicks. After uninstalling the update and rolling back to the previous version, the sluggishness disappeared, but the Start menu issue persists: none of the Windows-related...
item.dc:creator: FinneasHayes

item.title: Entra and Microsoft 365 Could Improve License Reporting
item.description: License insights is a new feature in the Entra admin center. The Microsoft 365 admin center also shows some license insights in a dashboard card. The two views don’t line up. This isn’t very surprising because different teams generated the information, but it would sure be nice if Microsoft...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Fabric Influencers Spotlight April 2026
item.description: Welcome to the April 2026 edition of the Fabric Influencers Spotlight, a recurring monthly post here to shine a bright light on the places on the internet where Microsoft MVPs & Fabric Super Users are doing some amazing work on all aspects of Microsoft Fabric. The Microsoft Fabric Community team...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Best approach for migrating AD joined devices to Entra ID without wiping user profiles?
item.description: We’ve seen many organizations struggle with device migration when moving from traditional Active Directory (AD) or hybrid environments to Microsoft Entra ID.The biggest challenge is avoiding user disruption especially when wiping devices causes profile loss, app reconfiguration, and downtime.In...
item.dc:creator: Pranavsethuraman10
